title: feishu_form_fill_prepare
description: Phase 1 of filling the built-in preset Feishu questionnaire from natural language. Parses `query` into the fixed fields 姓名 / 参会时间 / 参会人数, normalizes the meeting time into a human-readable value, and stops before final submission for human review.

query.description: Natural-language source text to parse into questionnaire answers.
examples: 帮我填写这份报名问卷：我叫张三，手机号 13800138000，公司是 OpenAI，岗位是产品经理，下周三下午可以参加。
